scale.counter_token: text-[15vw] sm:text-[10vw] font-display uppercase tracking-tight leading-none

rules: No generic SaaS fonts (Inter, Roboto). Use Cabinet Grotesk for all major headings.
Counter portal uses Anton for massive, glanceable token numbers.
Kitchen timers must use JetBrains Mono to prevent layout shift during countdowns.
Use uppercase tracking-[0.2em] for small labels and overlines.
Customer/Admin must feel warm, tactile, and appetizing (Terracotta and Stone).
Kitchen/Counter must be high-contrast dark mode for eye relief and glanceability.
Never use pure black or pure white; always tint slightly.

customer_portal.components: Generous breathing room, overlapping elements, bento grids for menu highlights.

admin_portal.components: Dense but clear. Cardless design (grid borders) to maximize data density.

kitchen_portal.components: Horizontal scrolling or multi-column flex wrap. 100% height utilization.

counter_portal.components: Two massive full-height columns (Preparing vs Ready). No padding around edges.

ai_waiter.description: Floating dock widget expanding into a full-screen blurred chat overlay.
ai_waiter.styling: Glassmorphism base (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70), 1px solid border-white/40, warm shadow-lg. Input field rounded-full.

menu_item_card.styling: rounded-2xl bg-surface border-0 shadow-sm hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-300. Image takes up 60% of card height, full bleed.

kds_order_ticket.description: Kitchen Display System individual order card.
kds_order_ticket.styling: rounded-none or max rounded-md. High contrast borders. border-l-8 for status color. Background #141414. Massive fonts for special notes (bg-warning text-black).

admin_stat_card.styling: Cardless. Flat background, 1px subtle border-border, no shadow. text-3xl font-medium for metrics.

interactions_and_motion.hover_states: All buttons: slight scale (scale-95 on active), hover:bg-primary_hover hover:text-white.
interactions_and_motion.page_transitions: Framer motion fade and slight slide-up (y: 10, opacity: 0 to 1).
interactions_and_motion.kds_alerts: Pulse animation for delayed tickets (animate-pulse border-primary). Haptic/Auditory cue integration ready.
interactions_and_motion.counter_update: Flip-clock or slot-machine roll animation when a new token moves from Preparing to Ready.

media_and_assets.icons: lucide-react for Admin/Customer. @phosphor-icons/react (Duotone) for Customer Marketing.

hero_customer.description: Warm lit restaurant interior. Use with bg-black/30 overlay.

menu_burger_1.description: Gourmet burger for menu item card.

menu_burger_2.description: Another gourmet burger for menu grid.

kitchen_bg.description: Chef cooking. Use for login/auth backgrounds on the operational portals.

testing_and_accessibility.data_testid: MANDATORY: All interactive elements must have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='add-to-cart-btn').
testing_and_accessibility.contrast: Customer/Admin must meet APCA minimums. Kitchen/Counter uses hyper-contrast (WCAG AAA) for extreme environments.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use standard HTML/Tailwind for customer marketing layouts (bento grid, overlapping), do not rely purely on Shadcn Cards.
Admin uses Shadcn tables and charts (recharts).
Kitchen display must use pure CSS grid/flex with drag-and-drop structural prep (use highly distinctive background colors for ticket statuses: Red=Late, Green=Ready).
AI Waiter must be a floating absolute/fixed component available across the /customer route.
DO NOT use Inter or Roboto. Apply Cabinet Grotesk for headings and Manrope for body across the app via next/font.
